info.title: fantomless
info.description:
This library aims at formatting F# source files based on a given configuration.
Fantomas will ensure correct indentation and consistent spacing between elements in the source files.
Some common use cases include:
(1) Reformatting a code base to conform a universal page width
(2) Converting legacy code from verbose syntax to light syntax
(3) Formatting auto-generated F# signatures.

options.name: --force
options.description:
Print the source unchanged if it cannot be parsed
correctly.

options.name: --fsi
options.description: Read F# source from stdin as F# signatures.

options.name: --stdin
options.description: Read F# source from standard input.

options.name: --stdout
options.description: Write the formatted source code to standard output.

options.name: --out
options.description:
Give a valid path for files/folders. Files should
have .fs, .fsx, .fsi, .ml or .mli extension only.

options.name: --check
options.description:
Don't format files, just check if they have changed.
Exits with 0 if it's formatted correctly, with 1 if
some files need formatting and 99 if there was an
internal error

options.name: --daemon
options.description:
Daemon mode, launches an LSP-like server to can be
used by editor tooling.
